title: Vector Operator
description: vector-operator health: controller reconciliation, API server load, vector agents/aggregators internal metrics, event collector.

list.name: operator_job
list.label: Operator job
list.description: Scrape job of the vector-operator metrics endpoint.

list.name: agent_job
list.label: Agent job
list.description: Scrape job of the vector agent pods (internalMetrics exporter, port 9598).

list.name: aggregator_job
list.label: Aggregator job
list.description: Scrape job of the vector aggregator pods (internalMetrics exporter, port 9598).

list.name: group_by
list.label: Group by
list.description: Grouping for the per-component panels: component_type stays cheap at thousands of pipelines, component_id drills down to a single component.

list.name: evc_job
list.label: Event collector job
list.description: Scrape job of the event-collector deployment (port 8080).

panels.title: Operator Up
panels.description: 1 if the operator metrics endpoint is scraped successfully.

panels.title: Reconcile Errors (per s)
panels.description: Failed reconciliations across all controllers.

panels.title: Workqueue Depth
panels.description: Items waiting across all controller workqueues.

panels.title: Agent Events In (per s)
panels.description: Log events emitted by agent sources (self-monitoring internal_metrics events excluded; sources report output as sent_events).

panels.title: Agent Events Out (per s)
panels.description: Events delivered by agent sinks (the operator-generated internalMetricsSink is excluded).

panels.title: Agent Component Errors (per s)
panels.description: Errors reported by agent components; the counter first appears when an error occurs.

panels.title: Reconcile Rate
panels.description: Reconciliations per second by controller.

panels.title: Reconcile Errors
panels.description: Failed reconciliations per second by controller.

panels.title: Reconcile Duration
panels.description: Reconcile latency quantiles by controller.

panels.title: Reconcile Workers
panels.description: Active workers vs the configured maximum per controller. Sustained active == max means the controller is saturated.

panels.title: Workqueue Depth
panels.description: Items waiting in each controller workqueue. Growing depth means reconciliation cannot keep up.

panels.title: Workqueue Latency p99
panels.description: How long items wait in the queue before processing starts.

panels.title: Workqueue Retries
panels.description: Requeue rate by workqueue.

panels.title: API Server Requests
panels.description: Operator requests to the Kubernetes API server by method and response code.

panels.title: Memory (RSS)
panels.description: Operator resident memory.

panels.title: CPU (cores)
panels.description: Operator CPU usage.

panels.title: Goroutines
panels.description: Goroutine count; a steady climb indicates a leak.

panels.title: Events In by Source (top 10)
panels.description: Busiest agent sources. Sources report their output as sent_events (kubernetes_logs emits no received_events).

panels.title: Events Out by Sink (top 10)
panels.description: Busiest agent sinks.

panels.title: Component Errors
panels.description: Errors by component and type. The counter first appears when an error occurs.

panels.title: Utilization (top 10)
panels.description: Busiest components; 1.0 means the component is a bottleneck.

panels.title: Buffer Events
panels.description: Events currently held in component buffers.

panels.title: Buffer Discarded
panels.description: Events dropped from buffers. The counter first appears when a drop occurs.

panels.title: Source Lag p99 (top 15 pods)
panels.description: Delay between an event happening and vector ingesting it; 15 slowest agent pods shown.

panels.title: Open Files (top 15 pods)
panels.description: Log files held open by kubernetes_logs sources; 15 busiest agent pods shown.

panels.title: Events In by Pod (top 15)
panels.description: Log ingest rate per agent pod (internal_metrics excluded); uneven rates point at hot nodes. 15 busiest pods shown.

panels.title: Events In by Source (top 10)
panels.description: Busiest aggregator sources (sources report output as sent_events).

panels.title: Events Out by Sink (top 10)
panels.description: Busiest aggregator sinks.

panels.title: Component Errors
panels.description: Errors by component and type. The counter first appears when an error occurs.

panels.title: Utilization (top 10)
panels.description: Busiest aggregator components; 1.0 means the component is a bottleneck.

panels.title: Buffer Events
panels.description: Events currently held in aggregator buffers.

panels.title: Event Collector
panels.description: Kubernetes Events pipeline: handled = matched and forwarded, skipped = filtered out, processed = pushed to the aggregator over gRPC.
